title: Kira's Rainbow Bites
synopsis: Baby Kira discovers colorful foods with delightful sounds and tastes, from red strawberries that go 'pop' to purple grapes that go 'squish', creating a joyful sensory journey through the rainbow of flavors.

pages.text: Kira loves to eat! Yum, yum!

illustration.description: Adorable baby Kira with dark curly hair and warm brown skin sits in a bright yellow high chair, clapping her small hands together with pure joy. Her round face beams with a huge smile showing tiny teeth. The background is soft cream with floating pastel rainbow circles.
illustration.alt: Happy baby Kira in yellow high chair clapping

illustration.description: Kira holds a bright red strawberry between her tiny fingers, her eyes wide with wonder as juice drips down her chin. The strawberry is oversized and glistening. Background shows soft red watercolor washes with white polka dots for a playful feel.
illustration.alt: Kira holding red strawberry with juice on chin

illustration.description: Kira bites into a thick orange carrot stick, her cheeks puffed out slightly from chewing. Small orange crumbs scatter around her mouth. The background features warm orange gradients with simple geometric shapes in lighter orange tones.
illustration.alt: Kira crunching orange carrot with crumbs

illustration.description: Kira squeezes a peeled yellow banana in her fist, the soft fruit oozing between her fingers as she giggles. Her expression shows pure delight at the squishy texture. Soft yellow background with white cloud-like shapes floating gently.
illustration.alt: Kira squishing yellow banana in her hand

illustration.description: Kira picks up bright green peas one by one with her pincer grasp, her tongue sticking out in concentration. Several peas roll across her tray. The background is soft sage green with tiny white dots scattered like confetti.
illustration.alt: Kira picking up green peas with concentration

illustration.description: Kira has purple-blue stains around her mouth from mashed blueberries, looking absolutely delighted with the mess she's made. Small whole blueberries dot her tray and fingers. Soft blue watercolor background with gentle white swirls.
illustration.alt: Kira with blue blueberry stains around mouth

illustration.description: Kira holds a small purple grape up to examine it closely, her eyes crossed slightly as she focuses on the tiny fruit near her face. Her expression is one of scientific curiosity. Deep purple background with silver star-like sparkles.
illustration.alt: Kira examining purple grape very closely

illustration.description: Kira sits surrounded by colorful food pieces on her tray - red strawberry bits, orange carrots, yellow banana, green peas, blue blueberries, and purple grapes. She raises both hands in celebration with a huge messy smile. Rainbow arc glows softly in the background.
illustration.alt: Kira celebrating with rainbow of foods around her

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: What sound does the red strawberry make?
questions.explanation: The red strawberry goes POP! when Kira bites it.

questions.question: What color is the carrot?
questions.explanation: Kira eats an orange carrot that goes CRUNCH!

questions.question: What does Kira say about all her foods?
questions.explanation: Kira loves all her rainbow foods and says 'Yum, yum!'
